title: Analysis Summary
description: Top-level JSON output of provider static analysis. One file per provider analysis run.

total_ok.description: Count of affirmative log messages emitted during analysis. Not a method count — a single method may produce multiple affirmatives.

total_warnings.description: Total number of warnings across all methods. A single method may contribute multiple warnings across different bins.

total_errors.description: Total number of errors across all methods.

scores.description: Aggregate health metrics. All rates are normalised to [0, 1].

methods_with_mocks.description: Methods for which a sample response could be generated (mock-eligible).

methods_with_transforms.description: Methods that have a response transform template.

methods_clean.description: Methods with zero warnings and zero errors.

error_rate.description: Fraction of methods that have at least one error. Range [0, 1].

warning_rate.description: Fraction of methods that have at least one warning. Range [0, 1].

clean_rate.description: Fraction of methods with no errors and no warnings (may still have info-level findings). Range [0, 1].

mock_coverage.description: Fraction of methods for which a mock response was generated. Range [0, 1].

bins.description: Findings grouped by classification bin. Keys are bin names.

errors.description: Resource references (service.resource) that produced errors in this bin.

warnings.description: Resource references (service.resource) that produced warnings in this bin.

services.description: Per-service aggregates. Keys are service names.

error_count.description: Total errors across all resources in this service.

warning_count.description: Total warnings across all resources in this service.

errors.description: Infrastructure-level errors not attributable to a specific finding (e.g. provider load failures).
